response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a skilled individual contributor with a broad technical background, but he fundamentally does not meet the requirements for an executive CTO role. He has no demonstrated engineering leadership or people management experience across his entire 20-year career — every role has been as a developer or staff-level IC. The agentic AI exposure is limited to a 6-month staff engineering role ending in October 2025 (before a current caregiving gap), with no evidence of production multi-agent systems at scale. The fintech depth is superficial, and there is no track record of scaling or governing engineering organizations.
strengths: Broad distributed-systems and backend experience, including high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Recent hands-on exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, showing awareness of the domain
Strong engineering craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and polyglot technical depth across many stacks
concerns: Zero engineering leadership or people management history — every role on the resume is an individual contributor, with no team-building, hiring, or org-scaling responsibility
Agentic AI production experience is thin: 6 months at re:cinq contributing to tooling, followed by a career gap — far short of the demonstrated multi-agent production systems required
No fintech infrastructure depth in credit systems, payment flows, compliance, or regulated-environment AI operations — RIDE Capital exposure was brief and not AI-focused
